prediction.reasoning: As an AI without real-time market access or historical data for ICE, this prediction relies on general financial market assumptions. The point estimate is set to the current price ($162.37) as a neutral baseline given no specific directional indicators. The confidence intervals are estimated by assuming an average daily price standard deviation of approximately 2% (typical for many stocks), extrapolated over 6 days using the square root of time rule for volatility. These are statistical estimations and actual market performance can vary significantly.
